title: AlinPerspective
description: Mod that allows you to rotate the camera 360° from third person. Analog of PerspectiveModRedux
body:
# AlinPerspective Mod that allows you to rotate the camera 360 from third person
Analog of [PerspectiveModRedux](https://modrinth.com/mod/perspective-mod-redux), but with its own features [![alinlib](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/alinlib/Requires.svg)](/mod/alinlib) ![гифка](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7ljp9E4A/images/0e66750e4301d9d6517afc7fd66c05905beb1903.gif) ### The mod doesn't include zoom, on the gif it was an accidental click. This is the Zume mod ### Standard Key: - F4: Turn Mod On/Off - Left ALT: Rotate player [![kel](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/me/Made%20by.svg)](https://kelcu.ru)
